answers.question: What are the specific property maintenance requirements for residents regarding weeds?
Are there exceptions in the property maintenance code to allow for cultivated pollinator gardens?
What are the penalties/fees for failing to comply with property maintenance regulations?
answers.answer: The penalty for failing to comply with property maintenance regulations is that the Town will engage contractors to perform the necessary work, and the cost of this work will become a lien against the property. Additionally, an administrative fee of 20% will be added to the cost of the cleanup. (§ 221-2)

answers.question: What is the timeline for resolving a property maintenance violation before penalties are applied?
answers.answer: The timeline for resolving a property maintenance violation before penalties are applied is 10 days following the receipt of the notice. (§ 221-2)

answers.question: Does the property maintenance law go beyond the property lot lines (such as to the curb)?
